docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-31-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEMAR, RANDALL
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONERLY, DAVID
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,777.00 FILED BY CONERLY, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LEMAR, RANDALL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,777.50 FILED BY CONERLY, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LEMAR, RANDALL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-08-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WILL AMEND CLAIM AND RE-SERVE DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-06-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DAVID CONERLY & DEFENDANT RANDALL LEMAR, A/K/A LEMAR RANDALL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED CLAIM. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DAVID CONERLY AND DEFENDANT RANDALL LEMAR, WHOSE TRUE NAME IS LEMAR RANDALL. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED/REPORTER. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONERLY, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LEMAR, RANDALL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED AUG-06-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEMAR, RANDALL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONERLY, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RANDALL, LEMAR THE COURT ORDERS ZERO DOLLARS FOR COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
